text:
The Platform Innovation Kit is a
visual framework and easy-to-
use strategy and innovation
toolset for sustainable digital
platforms & ecosystems.
It helps you to
• Discover new platform opportunities in future ecosystems
• Prototype, validate and Launch
• Growth hack and scale
• Build a triple bottom line business
• Assess the performance of an existing platform
make better strategic decisions
PLATFORM
IN MOUSTION KIT
VISUAL FRAMEWORK
Visualize your team's thinking in a structured way.
STRATEGY & INNOVATION TOOLSET
Build strategic relevant new business opportunities
PLATFORMS & ECOSYSTEMS
Optimized for multi-sided and network based businesses
RIGHT STEPS & FOCUS
Understand & apply best practices in building platforms step-by-step
DISCOVER & IDEATE
Explore inefficiencies in existing value chains and create portfolios of new business
opportunities
BUSINESS MODELLING
Define all aspects of a business model incl. monetization strategies
PROTOTYPE & VALIDATE
Track and adjust the assumptions behind your Minimal Viable Platform
GROWTH HACK
Find effective growth hacks to improve liquidity and traction
ASSESSMENT
Benchmark your platform business against 20 platform best practices
DECISION MAKING
Align thinking among your leadership team and draw better decisions
